creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since the rapid refresh of the make system that has been committed recently, out of tree kmod's are having trouble being built.  They fail due to missing src.opts.mk files now.

===>  Building for cuse4bsd-kmod-0.1.33_1
make -f /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/cuse4bsd-kmod/work/cuse4bsd-kmod-0.1.33/Makefile.lib  " PTHREAD_LIBS=-pthread" " DESTDIR=" " KMODNAME=cuse4bsd" " KMODDIR=/boot/modules" " LIBDIR=/usr/local/lib" " INCLUDEDIR=/usr/local/include" " MANDIR=/usr/local/man/man" all
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/cuse4bsd-kmod/work/cuse4bsd-kmod-0.1.33
cc  -O2 -pipe  -fno-strict-aliasing   -D_GNU_SOURCE -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector   -Qunused-arguments -c cuse4bsd_lib.c -o cuse4bsd_lib.o
building static cuse4bsd library
ranlib -D libcuse4bsd.a
cc -fpic -DPIC  -O2 -pipe  -fno-strict-aliasing   -D_GNU_SOURCE -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector   -Qunused-arguments -c cuse4bsd_lib.c -o cuse4bsd_lib.So
building shared library libcuse4bsd.so.1
gzip -cn cuse4bsd.3 > cuse4bsd.3.gz
make -f /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/cuse4bsd-kmod/work/cuse4bsd-kmod-0.1.33/Makefile.kmod  " PTHREAD_LIBS=-pthread" " DESTDIR=" " KMODNAME=cuse4bsd" " KMODDIR=/boot/modules" " LIBDIR=/usr/local/lib" " INCLUDEDIR=/usr/local/include" " MANDIR=/usr/local/man/man" all
make[2]: "/usr/src/sys/conf/kmod.mk" line 75: Could not find src.opts.mk
make[2]: Fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
make[2]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/cuse4bsd-kmod/work/cuse4bsd-kmod-0.1.33
*** Error code 1

Fix: none.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: attempt to build
